calendar.matters:
Petition For Accounting
Off Calendar Jun-13-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Miyasaki, via Zoom, for Peter Y.M. Cheng, Petitioner; Brett Lytle, in court, for So Ping Chen and Eddie Shu-Wing Hong, Objectors.

The court points to the issue of San Francisco not appearing to be the proper venue for this matter. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the venue issue. The court advises that it is not convinced that venue is proper and queries counsel whether they prefer the court to take the petition off calendar or transfer the matter. Mr. Miyasaki would prefer the matter be transferred and Mr. Lytle defers to whichever process will be faster. The court recommends taking the matter off calendar and filing the petition in the proper venue as lately, there have been delays with the transfer process.

After brief discussion, the Accounting Petition is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

Petition For Accounting
Off Calendar May-02-2022 Continued To Jun-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
